title: RepoBrief contract hygiene fixes
goal: Fix small but high-friction contract and output-shape gaps: citation_map rows as directly valid range refs, populated top chunk spans where expected, and query JSON retaining line/source metadata.

acceptance.assertion: citation_map or related rows can be consumed as valid range refs without manual field injection.
Agent Reading Pack top chunk spans are populated or explicitly not_applicable with a tested reason.
query --emit json preserves line/source metadata needed for direct evidence use.
Focused contract/output-shape tests cover the repaired cases.

metadata.source_gap: Max-dump critique: citation_map range_refs needed manual completion; TOP_CHUNK_SPANS was empty; query JSON lost line numbers.
metadata.outcome: Implemented in Lenskit PR #915: hardened RepoBrief evidence contract/output shapes for citation map range refs, query JSON direct line/source metadata, and explicit TOP_CHUNK_SPANS status/reason.
validation: Lenskit PR #915 GitHub CI passed: pytest-full, ruff, CodeQL, doc-freshness, planning-registration, anti-hallucination-lint, forensic preflight canary, parity-gate, graph-model, lens-model, validates-schema-target-proof, repo-root, templates, validate-merge-meta, webui-js-tests and contract/static-security checks.
Local before merge: 350 focused/broader contract/output-shape tests passed.
Local before merge: targeted ruff-ci check passed.
Local before merge: planning-registration ratchet reported no new drift.
Local before merge: doc-freshness inspect PASS.
Local before merge: git diff --check passed.
Post-merge on origin/main bac371986e153e57f0f25bc1ecc799c8e4ea2476: same 350 tests passed.
Post-merge on origin/main: targeted ruff-ci check passed.
Post-merge on origin/main: planning-registration ratchet no new drift, doc-freshness PASS, git diff --check pass.

verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t019-range-ref-shape: New citation_map_jsonl rows include optional schema-valid canonical_md range_ref; RepoBrief access also synthesizes range_ref for legacy citation-map rows and tests range_get consumption.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t019-top-chunks: Agent Reading Pack TOP_CHUNK_SPANS emits status=available when populated and status=not_applicable with reason_code when not populated; both paths are tested.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t019-query-lines: query --emit json preserves source_path, line_range/start_line/end_line, byte_range/start_byte/end_byte while keeping legacy range string.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t019-tests: Focused tests cover citation-map production/schema/access, resolved evidence, query JSON metadata, Agent Reading Pack TOP_CHUNK_SPANS and related bundle-surface regressions.
